name: codex-utilities
description: Local Codex runtime utilities for thread, hook, and app-server workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Local Codex runtime helpers for hooks and thread utilities.
interface.longDescription: Codex Utilities collects small local Codex runtime helpers that do not belong to a language-specific skill pack. Its first utility captures SessionStart hook payloads so thread naming automation can be designed against real Codex app data.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me inspect local Codex runtime utility behavior.
